product.name: ArNeo Color Light
product.familyDescriptorPl: Fluorescencyjne dzianiny hi-vis na odzież ostrzegawczą
product.familyDescriptorEn: Fluorescent hi-vis knits for safety wear
product.categorySourceGroup: High Visible Warp Knit Fabrics for Safety Jackets
descriptions: ArNeo Color Light is 100% polyester, 65-70 g/m² warp knitted bias tape.
It used as bias farbic for safety jackets.
Depending on your bias design, it is possible to deliver bias tapes from 1cm up to 12cm.
technicalParameters: Dimensional Change | -5% < Length < +5% ; -5% < Width < +5% | EN ISO 5077
Dry Cleaning Fastness | 4-5 | EN ISO 105 D01
Hot Press Fastness | 4-5 | EN ISO 105 X11
Azo Test | No Azo Colorants. | EN ISO 14362-1
